sql_array: CREATE TABLE hyperbolic_sine_test (angle double, sinh_value double);
INSERT INTO hyperbolic_sine_test (angle, sinh_value) VALUES (0.5, sinh(0.5));
INSERT INTO hyperbolic_sine_test (angle, sinh_value) VALUES (1.0, sinh(1.0));
UPDATE hyperbolic_sine_test SET sinh_value = sinh(angle) WHERE angle > 0;
SELECT angle, sinh_value FROM hyperbolic_sine_test WHERE sinh_value > 0;
